2603.21155.title: Can LLMs Fool Graph Learning? Exploring Universal Adversarial Attacks on Text-Attributed Graphs
2603.21155.paper_summary: Text-attributed graphs (TAGs) enhance graph learning by integrating rich textual semantics and topological context for each node. While boosting expressiveness, they also expose new vulnerabilities in graph learning through text-based adversarial surfaces. Recent advances leverage diverse backbones, such as graph neural networks (GNNs) and pre-trained language models (PLMs), to capture both structural and textual information in TAGs. This diversity raises a key question: How can we design universal adversarial attacks that generalize across architectures to assess the security of TAG models? The challenge arises from the stark contrast in how different backbones-GNNs and PLMs-perceive and encode graph patterns, coupled with the fact that many PLMs are only accessible via APIs, limiting attacks to black-box settings. To address this, we propose BadGraph, a novel attack framework that deeply elicits large language models (LLMs) understanding of general graph knowledge to jointly perturb both node topology and textual semantics. Specifically, we design a target influencer retrieval module that leverages graph priors to construct cross-modally aligned attack shortcuts, thereby enabling efficient LLM-based perturbation reasoning. Experiments show that BadGraph achieves universal and effective attacks across GNN- and LLM-based reasoners, with up to a 76.3% performance drop, while theoretical and empirical analyses confirm its stealthy yet interpretable nature.
2603.21155.paper_summary_zh: 文本屬性圖（TAGs）通過整合每個節點的豐富文本語義和拓撲上下文來增強圖學習。<lb/>在提升表達能力的同時，它們也通過基於文本的對抗表面暴露了圖學習中的新漏洞。<lb/>最近的進展利用多樣的骨幹，如圖神經網絡（GNNs）和預訓練語言模型（PLMs），來捕捉TAGs中的結構和文本信息。<lb/>這種多樣性提出了一個關鍵問題：我們如何設計通用的對抗攻擊，以便跨架構進行泛化，從而評估TAG模型的安全性？<lb/>挑戰來自於不同骨幹（GNNs和PLMs）在感知和編碼圖模式方面的明顯差異，加上許多PLMs僅可通過API訪問，這限制了攻擊的黑箱設置。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了BadGraph，一個新穎的攻擊框架，深度引導大型語言模型（LLMs）理解一般圖知識，以共同擾動節點拓撲和文本語義。<lb/>具體而言，我們設計了一個目標影響者檢索模塊，利用圖先驗來構建跨模態對齊的攻擊捷徑，從而實現高效的基於LLM的擾動推理。<lb/>實驗表明，BadGraph在基於GNN和LLM的推理器中實現了通用且有效的攻擊，性能下降高達76.3%，而理論和實證分析確認了其隱蔽但可解釋的特性。
2603.21155.author: Zihui Chen et.al.
2603.21155.authors: Zihui Chen, Yuling Wang, Pengfei Jiao, Kai Wu, Xiao Wang, Xiang Ao, Dalin Zhang
